hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM [a-z_]+ WHERE 1=1"; then echo "[SAFETY] Destructive command detected. Please confirm with the user before proceeding."; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '\.env(\.|$)' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"[SAFETY] .env files are protected — reading/writing not allowed"}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '\.env(\.|$| |'"'"'|")' && echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"[SAFETY] .env files are protected — access via Bash not allowed"}' || true
